user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Omega
Product type: Speedmaster Moonwatch
Tone: precise, adventurous, iconic
Visual style: A sleek, high-contrast visual style emphasizing metallic textures and space-inspired elements to evoke innovation and heritage.
Conceptual technique: heritage storytelling with a focus on exploration and technical mastery
Format: image

brief.headline: Time Flies Beyond Earthly Bounds
brief.caption: Against a backdrop of the moon's rugged surface, the Omega Speedmaster Moonwatch rests confidently, its reflective dial catching the Earth’s distant glow, symbolizing its legacy as the first watch worn on the moon.
brief.visual_style: A sleek, high-contrast visual style emphasizing metallic textures and space-inspired elements to evoke innovation and heritage.
brief.conceptual_technique: heritage storytelling with a focus on exploration and technical mastery
brief.typography_style: Condensed, technical sans-serif font, reminiscent of instrumentation dials
brief.color_scheme: space black, lunar grey, and orbital white
